description: Account ledger, probably communal. 46 bifolia. Dated throughout by each weekly parsha of the liturgical calendar. At first glance, image 35 of the ledger contains a plausible year התע׳׳ד (1713 CE) but this date falls much earlier than a potential nineteenth-century signature that appears on recycled paper in later pages. On images 44-45 it is clear these folios were recycled from legal document drafts bearing the signature of Shelomo Alyiqīm, who may be the same person that signed AIU VII.D.24 in 1842/43 CE (PGPID 30523) and BL OR 5561A.7 in 1842 CE (PGPID 19229). The similarities of these signatures support a later dating estimate of mid- to late-nineteenth century. Further research on other community members mentioned in the ledger will be necessary to provide a more accurate estimate. MCD.
